name: command_pack_remove
documentation:
Removes a workspace command pack.

## Behavior
Removes one command pack directory from workspace/commands by safe name.
The command pack must already exist; missing packs raise an error instead of silently succeeding.

## Input Schema
Type: object
Required: name
Properties:
- name: string

## Output Schema
Type: object
Required: none
Properties: none declared.

## Dependencies
Libraries: plugin_runtime, command_packs
Requirements: none
Tags: commands, removal
